What's behind it

BTC spot $75,822
MROI = Valuation + Holder Behavior. Two complementary BTC lenses, partially correlated (0.631), not independent axes.

Milk Road Macro Index reads the outside risk-asset regime. Milk Road on-chain index uses the same product skeleton for BTC’s inside view: realized-cost valuation plus what meaningful holder cohorts are doing across on-chain, DAT and ETF channels. The technical math handle remains MROI.

1How the index has evolved

Milk Road on-chain index How MROI works: MROI adds the Valuation dimension to the Holder Behavior dimension. The line is the production composite; background shading mirrors the Macro Index chart treatment.

Production MROI over time; BTC can be toggled as a normalized overlay.

MROI BTC
How well does this work historically?

Walk-forward binary sizing by BTC cycle, using the same production 0% / 100% values and no leverage.

WindowBTC B&HMROI tierAlphaBTC DDMROI DD
Full sample+42.4%+55.1%+12.7%-84.5%-65.9%
2014-2017+66.3%+88.9%+22.6%-80.8%-47.7%
2018-2021+23.1%+23.7%+0.6%-81.4%-65.9%
2022-2024+17.5%+37.9%+20.4%-66.9%-34.5%
2025-now-9.8%+5.9%+15.8%-49.6%-10.4%
2How BTC is valuedValuation lens

Valuation. Answers where BTC trades relative to realized cost-basis and miner-revenue anchors — the strongest multi-month mean-reversion lens in the framework.

Valuation What you're seeing: the Valuation dimension z-score over time. It is the equal-weighted mean of the same lagged 504d z-scored valuation constituents used by production MROI. The zero line is neutral; no MROI tier shading appears because this is a component, not the sizing rule.

Latest: -0.74 · SOFT

Valuation drivers

Each driver is the production lagged 504d rolling z-score imported from onchain_index.composite.valuation_constituents.

z(STH MVRV)+0.16

Short-term holder cost-basis valuation.

z(RHODL Ratio)-1.44

Realized-value age-band valuation oscillator.

z(Puell Multiple)-0.44

Miner-revenue valuation lens.

z(MVRV-Z)-1.23

Canonical realized-cap deviation metric.

3How holders are positioningHolder Behavior lens

Holder Behavior. Answers whether meaningful holders are adding or shedding conviction across on-chain, corporate DAT and ETF cohorts. It is a complementary lens to Valuation, partially correlated (0.631) rather than statistically independent.

Holder Behavior What you're seeing: the Holder Behavior dimension z-score over time. It is the equal-weighted mean of available holder cohorts for each epoch: on-chain holders, corporate DAT, and institutional ETF flows. The zero line is neutral; no MROI tier shading appears because this is a component.

Latest: -0.60 · SOFT

Corporate DAT cohort: MSTR / Strategy, 100% of cohort signal.

Holder behavior drivers

Current cohorts each have one production constituent, so the cohort score is the drill-down series. The layout keeps room for multi-constituent cohorts later.

On-chain holders-1.32

z(HODL 1Y+ 30d-change, inverted).

Corporate DAT+0.39

z(MSTR / Strategy BTC holdings Δ 30d).

Institutional ETF-0.88

z(spot BTC ETF flow rolling 30d sum).

Composite formulas Suggest edit ↗
Valuation = mean_available(z(STH MVRV), z(RHODL), z(Puell Multiple), z(MVRV-Z)) Holder Behavior = mean_available(on-chain, corporate DAT, institutional ETF) MROI = Valuation + Holder Behavior

The renderer imports production composite functions directly; there is no dashboard-only signal path.

Tier thresholds Suggest edit ↗
MROI bucketTierAllocation
<= 0.0CASH0%
> 0.0STAY LONG100%
Walk-forward methodology Suggest edit ↗

Backtests use BTC daily returns from BMP btc_price, apply the tier allocation to each day's return, and evaluate fixed cycle windows: 2014-2017, 2018-2021, 2022-2024, and 2025-now. Composite inputs are lagged through the rolling z-score helper, so a score dated T uses source data through T-1.

Resolved framework choices Suggest edit ↗
QuestionCurrent v1 posture
Sizing floorResolved at 0% for CASH and 100% for STAY LONG.
Tier namingResolved to MRMI wording: CASH / STAY LONG.
Threshold methodResolved to the MRMI-shape zero threshold: invested only when MROI > 0.
Diagnostic surfaceKeep holder sub-cohorts prominent so composition drift is visible.
